summary: Pack 8 - Launch Stabilization Pack testing completed successfully. All 16 backend API tests pass. All 3 admin frontend pages verified: Affiliate Settings, Affiliate Payouts, Promo Campaigns.

features: data-testid='affiliate-settings-page'
General section: Enable program, applications, auto-approve
Commission Rules: Type, Rate, Fixed, Trigger
Tracking: Cookie window, promo codes, referral links
Payout & Qualification: Min amount, manual approval, terms URL
Customer Perk: Enable, type, value, cap, min order, categories, first order only, stackable
Save button with data-testid='save-settings-btn'
data-testid='affiliate-payouts-page'
Status filter dropdown (All, Pending, Approved, Paid, Rejected)
Payout cards with status badges
Approve/Reject buttons for pending
Mark as Paid button for approved
data-testid='affiliate-campaigns-page'
New Campaign button
Campaign cards with status (Active/Inactive/Upcoming/Expired)
Create Campaign form: name, slug, headline, description, dates, channel
Reward section: type, value, cap, addon code
Eligibility section: affiliate code required, first order only, min amount
Marketing section: promo code, landing URL, CTA, hashtags
Share Messages panel with platform-specific copy

GET /api/admin/campaign-marketing/{id}/m.returns: Platform messages for generic, whatsapp, instagram, facebook, linkedin, x

GET /affiliate-track/{code}.notes: Redirects to homepage with affiliate cookie

critical_code_review_comments: All Pack 8 routes properly use module-level db connection instead of request.app.mongodb
Marketing messages properly formatted for different social platforms (WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, X)
Campaign evaluation service correctly checks eligibility rules and redemption limits
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pack 8 implementation complete and verified. All affiliate settings, payout approval workflows, campaign CRUD, marketing message generation, and customer perk preview APIs working. Admin pages for Affiliate Settings (/admin/affiliate-settings), Affiliate Payouts (/admin/affiliate-payouts), and Promo Campaigns (/admin/affiliate-campaigns) all functional with proper UI/UX.
